name: agent-forge
description: A curated cross-CLI marketplace of agent skills, plugins, agents, and slash commands — works natively with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, OpenAI Codex CLI, Cursor, Factory.ai Droid, Sourcegraph Amp, Gemini CLI; with adapters for Kilo Code, OpenCode, Crush; and a portable loader for Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude.ai Projects.

plugins.name: msft-arch
plugins.description: Microsoft enterprise architecture suite: 32 specialist skills across 5 tiers (process, verticals, horizontals, long-tail specialists, output, cross-cutting). FINAL v5 expansion complete. Vertical specialists (Azure, Power Platform, D365, Containers, Data, AI) build solutions; horizontal architects (Identity, Security, IaC, .NET, FinOps, Observability, CI/CD, Threat Model) review them in parallel; long-tail specialists (MAUI, SRE, .NET Modernization, Defender+Sentinel) cover Phase 4 domains. Always-on horizontals run after every vertical; trigger-based and stack-pinned routing fire on signal match. Odin resolves cross-horizontal conflicts. Validate runs Council of Three on every output package.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Product and Program Management skill suite for technology industries. 12 composable skills following UNIX philosophy: philosophy, discover, map, tom-architect, epic-decompose, prd-draft, prd-validate, prd-review, backlog-decompose, backlog-ado, backlog-linear, backlog-github. Includes Product Constitution (living strategy doc), multi-platform TOM design, and 11-Star PRD quality framework. Works for SaaS product companies and consulting delivery firms.

plugins.name: prompts
plugins.description: Intelligent prompt engineering suite with signal-based technique selection (10 techniques across 3 tiers), automatic hardening patterns (10 composable patterns), UNIX-philosophy orchestrator agent, and voice calibration. Transforms raw intent into production-grade AI prompts.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Collection of writing transformation and text processing skills including humanization, voice calibration, and AI pattern detection
